parameters: I need to plant the herb specimens first.
Name's Ren. I'm working on forest conservation
Heard someone new was in town.
Just got back, actually. Grew up around here.
What can I do for you?
I wanted to understand what you're doing here,
We process the herbs harvested from the
Clean them, prepare them, package them for
trade. Faster and cleaner than anything the
How long have you been operating?
We started small, and then grew quickly.
Turns out there's significant demand for what
Because what grows here doesn't grow anywhere
That's actually what I wanted to talk to you
The species here are endangered, Doran.
I've spent two days documenting what's left in
the Grove alone. Plants are disappearing
The restoration zone to the west-
I know what it looks like.
Look, I'm not blind to it.
But I have a facility to run.
Trade relationships that took years to build.
And when there's nothing left to harvest?
That's a problem for another day.
It's already a problem for this day!
I understand what you're saying. Truly.
But this facility changed things for the
Before we arrived, everything was done by hand.
Now the processing is faster, cleaner, more
They benefit from this too. They don't need to
spend all day slaving out in the fields
They trade their reserves, they earn more,
and they can finally have some rest.
They don't harvest by hand anymore?
Why would they? We handle it.
If your facility handles the harvesting-
Who was taking from the Grove while you were
My workers still operate while I'm travelling.
The Grove isn't a quota system, Doran.
Those plants don't grow back on a schedule.
The knowledge of which plants to take and how
That was passed down for generations!
And now they don't have to do it anymore.
You didn't set out to erase that, did you...?
Of course not. I set out to build something.
I can't be responsible for every consequence
Look, Ren, I do what's best for this operation,
for the people it employs, and for this
community. That's all I can do.
If you find a way to do all of that and
protect every plant in that forest, I'll be
He's not wrong about all of it.
Time to head back to the cabin and rest.
Long day. The orders don't stop coming.
Yeah, the first wave in the restoration zone.
Hm. I'll believe it when I see it.
But Ren, truly, I hope it will.
The forest doesn't rest, and neither do we.
I'm heading to the zone first.
A proper full day for you, huh?
The planting is good, Ren. Quite admirable to
be honest with you. The people will notice.
Just don't expect them to say so.
Argh! Ow...! These old bones are feeling it today...
My legs are gonna fall off. *huff* *puff*
Wanna engage in some good ol' fashioned trading?
I've got the best stock in town.
Sorry, ma'am. I'm afraid I'm not your
Yesterday gave me enough to work with.
